sections.projects: Projects and Research B.Tech 2nd Year-Computer Science &Engineering(AIML)Woxsen University,Telangana2024 – 2028CGPA:7.59, SGPA:8.41ContactEducationG.AKSHITHA REDDYSkillsTeam Collaboration Analytical ThinkingTime ManagementCommunication Skills Developed a web-based grievance management system to manage and resolve studentcomplaints. Built analytics dashboards to analyzecomplaint trends using HTML, CSS, PHP, MySQL, and XAMPP.SOT Student Grievance Management System9398452705Hyderabadg.akshitha.reddy1@gmail.comhttps://www.linkedin.com/in/g-akshitha-reddy-65a793347/English TeluguHindiLanguagesTechnical SkillsProgramming Languages: Java, PythonWeb Technologies: HTML, CSSDatabases: MySQL (Basic)Machine Learning: Scikit-learn (Basics), DataPreprocessing, Model Evaluation Core Concepts: Object-Oriented Programming,Data Structures (Basic) Tools: Git, VS Code, Jupyter NotebookAuthenticity Analysis of Real and AI-Generated Images Using DeepLearningDeveloped a deep learning system to detect whether images are real or AI-generated usingCNN and transfer learning. Trained the model on the CIFAKE dataset and evaluatedperformance using metrics such as accuracy, precision, recall, and confusion matrix. Built aweb interface for real-time image verification, achieving 97.67% classification accuracy.Campus Shuttle Routing & Capacity SchedulingDisease Diagnosis using Machine LearningBuilt a machine learning model using Python and Scikit-learn to predict diabetes using thePIMA Indian Diabetes Dataset. Performed data preprocessing and feature selection andimplemented a Random Forest classifier, achieving ~74% prediction accuracy.Designed an optimized campus transportation routing system using graph-based modelingand the Greedy Nearest Neighbor algorithm. Improved route planning efficiency whileconsidering bus capacity and scheduling constraints.Social Event Management Web ApplicationDeveloped a web-based platform connecting customers with event service providers.Implemented service search, booking, rating, and location-based recommendations with adatabase to manage users, services, bookings, and feedback.Aspiring Computer Science and Engineering student with a strong interest inArtificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, and Web Development. Good foundation in programming, data analysis, andproblem-solving, with a focus on applying theoretical knowledge to real-worldproblems. Seeking opportunities to enhance technical expertise and contribute toinnovative technology solutions.Professional Summary Academic ExperienceCollaborated in team-based academic projects,contributing to planning, development, andimplementation.Presented research findings and project outcomes ininternal evaluations.Applied classroom concepts to real-world problemsthrough practical projects.
